response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience with strong software craftsmanship credentials (TDD, CI/CD, mentoring via workshops) and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq. However, the resume lacks demonstrated depth in production GenAI systems, RAG architectures, vector databases, and major cloud platform AI services (AWS/GCP/Azure) — all core requirements. AI experience appears recent (<1 year) versus the 8+ years required, making this a borderline fit better suited to a technical screen to probe actual GenAI depth.
strengths: Strong polyglot engineering background with TypeScript, Node.js, and production systems at scale
Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Proven technical leadership through workshops, talks, and mentoring (Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos)
concerns: AI/GenAI production experience appears limited to ~1 year, far short of the 8+ years required
No explicit evidence of RAG, vector databases, or LLM evaluation/observability work
Cloud experience limited to AWS CDK at Optilyz; no demonstrated GCP/Azure or cloud-native AI service delivery

key_factors.factor: Recent MCP and agentic workflow experience
